options.label: Direct reopen Lapidarium
pros: Makes the proposal immediately visible as a live continuation.
cons: Rewrites closed history and risks reopening execution boundaries.

options.label: Create post-Lapidarium architecture track
pros: Admits the operator source as a candidate-only branch.
cons: Adds a new route branch that must be carried forward explicitly.

options.label: Treat as DIAGNOSTICO_AUTOMACAO precondition candidate
pros: Avoids reopening Lapidarium while preserving the proposal.
cons: Does not reflect the operator-supplied phase sequence faithfully enough.

options.label: Block pending operator clarification
cons: Unnecessarily discards a complete operator source packet.
